mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_code, m.path, m.icon, m.component, m.menu_type, m.sort_order, m.visible, m.status FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.visible = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort_order
